from myapp.tasks import send_notification, process_item, generate_report


def notify_all_users(users):
    for user in users:
        send_notification.delay(user.email, "Your report is ready")


def batch_process_items(items):
    for item in items:
        process_item.apply_async(args=[item.id], countdown=10)


def generate_reports_for_team(team_members):
    for member in team_members:
        generate_report.delay(member.id, member.department)


def enqueue_orders(orders):
    for order in orders:
        process_item.delay(order.id)
        send_notification.delay(order.customer_email, "Order processed")
